description: Accessible dropdown menu with keyboard navigation and Popover API support

attributes.name: hover
attributes.description: Open on hover/focus instead of click (useful for nav menus)

attributes.name: no-flip
attributes.description: Disable automatic flip when menu overflows viewport

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Reflected state — set by open()/close()/toggle() methods, not intended as initial markup

structure.description: Trigger element that opens the menu
Menu container with <li> items holding <button> or <a> actions

childAttributes.name: data-trigger
childAttributes.description: Marks the element that opens the menu. Falls back to first <button> if absent.

events.name: drop-down:select
events.description: Fired when a menu item is selected
